questions.question: How does real-time insurance verification work?
questions.answer: Our system connects directly to insurance company databases to verify patient eligibility, benefits, and coverage details in seconds. This eliminates phone calls to insurance companies and ensures you have accurate information before treatment.

questions.question: Can we submit claims to all insurance carriers?
questions.answer: Yes, our platform supports electronic submission to over 2,000 insurance carriers nationwide. For any carriers that don't accept electronic claims, we provide a print and mail service at no additional charge.

questions.question: How does the system reduce rejected claims?
questions.answer: Our claim scrubbing technology checks every claim for over 100 potential errors before submission, including procedure-to-diagnosis compatibility, missing information, and insurance-specific requirements. This results in a 98% clean claim rate on first submission.

questions.question: What payment options can we offer patients?
questions.answer: The system supports all major payment methods including credit/debit cards, HSA/FSA cards, ACH bank transfers, and digital wallets. You can also set up customized payment plans with automated recurring payments for larger treatment cases.

questions.question: How long does implementation take?
questions.answer: Most practices are fully operational within 2 weeks. Our implementation team handles the setup of fee schedules, insurance connections, and payment processing. We also provide comprehensive training to ensure your team can maximize the system's capabilities.

reviews.name: Dr. Robert Thompson
reviews.comment: Since implementing this billing system, our collection rate has improved by 22% and we've reduced our accounts receivable aging by over 30 days. The automated insurance verification has saved our front desk hours of phone calls every day.

reviews.name: Lisa Garcia
reviews.comment: Managing insurance claims used to be our biggest headache. Now with the automated claim submission and follow-up, we've reduced our outstanding claims by 67% and increased our cash flow significantly.

reviews.name: Dr. Stephanie Wong
reviews.comment: The financial transparency this system provides has been transformative. We can now see exactly where our revenue is coming from and identify opportunities to improve. The patient estimator feature has also dramatically reduced payment discussions at checkout.

cta.title: Ready to Maximize Your Practice Revenue?
